events.name: The Shroom Shaman
events.description:
The conditions are just right for a rare variety of mushrooms to spawn. A local shaman requires 
    help gathering them before the weather turns.

events.name: Thirsty Bandits
events.description: Everyone wants a taste of Jensen's wine, especially bandits... they'd just rather not pay for it.

events.name: Flower Power
events.description:
Driven into a frenzy by the sickly sweet scent of dead and decaying flowers, Poisonpetals 
    have sprouted to defend their territory.

events.name: A Mushroom Cut in Half
events.description:
When a fungi's cut in half, a new one can be born from each part. Being continuously killed by 
    adventurers, sometimes the Ravenguard needs help putting them down.

events.name: Creepy Howls Under the Moon
events.description:
As the pale moonlight is shed upon the Mounds north of Ravencrest, the foxes respond 
    with a frightening howl.

events.name: Lit Beacons
events.description:
Dwarves, Warhogs, and Goblins hate each other with a passion. When the war beacons are lit, 
    they all converge to fight over territory.

events.name: Killer Bees
events.description: Interrupted while gathering pollen, a hive of furious Honey Wasps are swarming and attacking nearby threats.

events.name: The Dark Lighthouse
events.description: The coal basin at the top of the lighthouse is out. Gather oil from Zorians to re-light the basin.

events.name: Hidden Grounds
events.description:
Varner Barsavi's research has uncovered an old and well-hidden hunting ground, but who knows 
    if the dungeon is still infested with spiders?

events.name: Never Enough Furs
events.description: A fur trader passing through Margrove wants help obtaining more pelts to sell in Ravencrest.

events.name: In the Spiders Web
events.description: The weather is unusually warm in the Rohna Woods, and a cluster of spiders have emerged from the tunnels to feed.

events.name: Souls of the Forest
events.description: Sacred Rohna Undergrove, and Haunted Trunks have risen to drive out all intruders.

events.name: Man-Corrupted Grounds
events.description:
When travelers extract too much ores from Sporemine Swamp, haunted trunks appear in the 
    area to remind them the reason those grounds are haunted.

events.name: Trespassers Will Be Shot
events.description: Strangers have gotten too close to a Rohna Brotherhood hideout, and bandits have appeared to ensure their location stays secret.

events.name: A Troll's Favorite Food
events.description: The starving denizens of Tarnag Mountain walked down to Riverend in search for a meal!

events.name: Look Don't Touch
events.description:
The tropics of Sajecho are home to many type of flowers, 
    but be wary when choosing which ones to pick...

events.name: Misty Waters
events.description: On spooky nights, the wreckages of Dead Man's Shore emerge from the waters as revenant ships, searching for new souls to join their undead crew.

events.name: Greedy Gliders
events.description: The settlers of Sajecho Village don't have much, but that doesn't stop Goblin Gliders from trying to steal everything they own.

events.name: Open Waters
events.description:
Too many of their ships have been sunk beneath the waves, and a League of Splinters fleet has 
    appeared to regain control of the sea.

events.name: A Usual Day at the Workshop
events.description:
Goblins never worry about consequences. An uncontrolled, destructive machine on the 
    loose in the workshop? A usual day like any other...

events.name: The Murmuring Tree
events.description: In the middle of the Crystal Fountains grows a red tree that blossoms with fruit during certain times of day, beckoning to those nearby...

events.name: Possessed by Resentment
events.description:
When the living insist on disturbing the dead, their resentment can grow to a point where 
    it overtakes their whole being.

events.name: Tower of the Everliving
events.description: Strange energies flow through this tower, what could have happened here?

events.name: Piss Drunk Patrons
events.description:
When the residents of Seabreeze get drunk, their inner pirates come out... 
    restore order to the streets!

events.name: Drunken Ritual
events.description: After unlocking an intricate mechanism in the deepest parts of the Hookmask's hideout countless bandits appeared to protect their lair.

events.name: Swarming Spread
events.description: As the wurms at Sugarcane Plantation are repelled over and over, they spread through the isle's landscapes, searching for a new lair.

events.name: Defiance Calls for Aid!
events.description:
The road between Bastion and Defiance is more dangerous than ever. Join up with the Ravenguard 
    to restore peace and safe travel once more!

events.name: Masked Onslaught
events.description:
After unlocking an intricate mechanism in the deepest parts of the Hookmask's hideout 
    countless bandits appeared to protect their lair.

events.name: An Escort to Bastion
events.description:
A local merchant, Tranter, is interested in hiring help to safely move his trade cargo to 
    the fortress of Defiance, in the center of Zephyr Vale.

events.name: An Escort to Defiance
events.description:
A local merchant, Tranter, is interested in hiring help to safely move his trade cargo to 
    the fortress of Defiance, in the center of Zephyr Vale.

events.name: Ghost of the Old Mariner
events.description:
Everyone on Harbor Isle avoids the hut on Blood Mountain... as the urban legend goes, 
    the place is haunted by an angry ghost.

events.name: Just a Drop
events.description: An aspiring Hookmask alchemist is looking to outsource a special mission to anyone willing to accept.

events.name: As Above So Below
events.description: A gravestone glows in the fading daylight, revealing a faint inscription carved into the moss-covered stone.

events.name: Reaping Harvest
events.description:
The Mutant Wolves are getting out of hand. Speak to Jurgen von Thuring to participate and 
    play the role of the reaper. Cull the wolves and make the roads safe once more!

events.name: An Escort to Truce
events.description:
Tranter is preparing to transport his goods to the town of Truce, on the Northern 
    frontier of Zephyr Vale, and is seeking protection on the route.

events.name: Gritty General
events.description:
General Galien seems to be back in action after your last encounter with him, 
    aggressive and hungry for vengeance!

events.name: The Astronomer's Prediction
events.description: With his eyes trained towards the stars, Zalzibar has seen red streaks in the sky... a sure omen of things to come.

events.name: Hunters Under the Sunheat
events.description: The scorching rays are empowering Firerock Foxes to seize more territory.

events.name: Raiders of the Wastes
events.description:
When the western trade routes through Hadarak are busy, Ghaz Raiders appear from the wastes 
    to pillage and kill.

events.name: What Does the Fox Say
events.description: Talking animals are said to hide within the C�nion Ventoso... they appear to lone hunters during certain times of the day.

events.name: Turmoil in Orkwatch
events.description: Orkwatch is in chaos! The orcs are fighting amongst themselves to determine a new Warchief!

events.name: A Sludging Mess
events.description: Sometimes, the rot living under Tarmire erupts into the surface, bringing the undead with it.

events.name: Windy Canyon Clash
events.description: Tensions are high in Windy Canyon - Ghaz Raiders and Warhogs are about to clash over territory!

events.name: The Bone Carver
events.description: In Windy Canyon, there's a note pinned to a palm tree advertising a bone carver who's willing to pay for Warhog Tusks.

events.name: Dangerous Denizens
events.description:
The shadows of the Tigerlilly Hills hide vicious predators... 
    Packs of chewacabras may appear at any time to ambush travellers.

events.name: Tax Collection
events.description:
The captain of Silvercliff hookmask camp is a hard one to meet. 
    However, whenever the bandits stack up enough sacks loot, he makes sure to come claim them himself.

events.name: The Blackscale Terror
events.description:
From the depths of The Spine, the last of the Blackscale Dragons emerge 
    to protect its home from invaders.

events.name: Overrun Hideout
events.description: An old Ghaz Raider hideout lies within these ruins... If found, are you capable of handling the secrets it holds inside?

events.name: Amphibious Assassins
events.description: Too many toads have been killed above Dras Narda, and the toads have launched a sneak attack!

events.name: When the Eastern Wind Blows
events.description:
A strong windblow takes the five contenders away to a small off-shore isle, 
    where a spirit manifests in the form of a lady made of wind.

events.name: Foreigner's Plague
events.description:
From time to time, illnesses from the mainland affect Vikkar Bay and its residents. 
    To prevent them from spreading, Lewett needs help brewing a cure.

events.name: Ancestral Feud
events.description:
Rivers of crimson flow through the gruesome architecture installed under the ruins. But the fountain
    isn't the only thing that awakens...
    
    The blood flows vividly in the ruined fountain, spreading its filth through the whole graveyard...

events.name: Toxicity
events.description:
From time to time, enormous quantities of poison are crafted by the rats of Crohollow Bog. 
    If left unchecked, this could mean a massacre of the people who still stand their ground in the region.

events.name: Night Sacrifice
events.description: Every night, a kaiman seer emerges from hiding to sacrifice victims captured in the jungles of Gilead.

events.name: Living Tale
events.description:
One of Hogula's legends speaks of a giant tortoise, capable of swallowing a 
    grown person in a single bite...

events.name: The Hoarder's Stash
events.description: The kaimans jump out from their hiding spots to defend their stolen goods!

events.name: Praise the Sun
events.description:
Saurians love the early hours of warm sunlight and don't appreciate when their 
    sunbathing gets disturbed...

events.name: Starving Crawlers
events.description:
As they're running out of food, spiders usually travel back to the surface and hide 
    amidst the white blanket of snow, waiting for the right time to ambush unaware preys.

events.name: Fishy Secrets
events.description:
Zorians don't tolerate intruders near their nests, they have younglings and 
    hard-earned spoils to protect!

events.name: Extremist Naturalists
events.description:
Taking refuge in a cavern deep below Gilead, these extremist naturalists are figuring 
    out a way to help nature reclaim the land.

events.name: Picky Eaters
events.description: A school of rare sturgeons are lured to the surface by the bait. Prepare your rod and get ready to fish!

events.name: Chain Reaction
events.description:
When a Crow Matriarch falls, the corrupted ecosystem of Crowhollow Bog reacts just like a 
    body trying to exterminate an alien organism, sending its thralls to retaliate upon the people of Woodhaven.

events.name: Tool Appropriation
events.description: The damage caused by the Winterborn Alliance is already done... might as well take what's left behind.

events.name: Raiders' Reunion
events.description:
To trade and share the spoils of their raiding, the Ghaz gather at at an ancient city, 
    abandoned by their mysterious previous inhabitants and forgotten by time.

events.name: Aggressive Preservation
events.description: Zorians emerge from the depths, attacking anything that dares come near the fishing spot.

events.name: Humanity Lost
events.description:
The knowledge of blood magic is kept secret amongst the elder vampires, and playing with 
    it irresponsibly may lead a soul to their darkest secrets.

events.name: A Bad Hookup
events.description:
The muddy waters of Crowhollow Bog are said to shelter countless oddities - from rare 
    fish schools to mutated abominations. In some places of the world, fishing isn't a sport.

events.name: Horn of Rage
events.description:
Minotaurs are one of the most aggressive creatures found in the land, some specimens are so hostile, 
    they have to be isolated from the rest of their kind.

events.name: Frolls over the Bridge
events.description:
What could the frolls be plotting so far from their lairs? 
    Sticking around to find out doesn't seem like a great idea...

events.name: A Muddy Catch
events.description:
Fishermen bold enough to venture into Crowhollow Bog speaks of a very rare fish capable of 
    living in the swamp's muddy and corrupt waters.

events.name: Risky Business
events.description: When mined, the glowing purple rock in the middle of the room begins to release a strange smell.

events.name: Fear the Reaper
events.description:
Strange lights can be seen glowing up the swamp during moonless nights. Some say it's 
    the work of wretched hags coming out of their lairs to harvest the souls of those lost within the bog.

events.name: Magical Pheromones
events.description:
Female blizzard beasts only choose the fittest and most fertile of mates, 
    and cannot resist the smell of a potent male.

events.name: Sealed Amidst the Fire
events.description:
Deep into the bowels of the land, a scorching magic rune corrupts the land, turning rivers into
     lava and ground into ashes.

events.name: Orcultist Society
events.description:
After Gilbert crafted a bone-made totem, Orcs have been gathering in the underground of Orkrev 
    to perform their traditional rituals. Better stop the ritual before we know what it is for.

events.name: Shackled Memories
events.description: Forever chained to the remnants of their settlement, the tormented spirits of Rumalos rise in anger and pain.

events.name: Children of the Damned
events.description:
Skorn cultists aren't a people to mess with... When enough of their own fall dead into the field, 
    they come out of their den seeking for Vengeance.

events.name: The Husk of Skorn
events.description:
Consumed by the evil spirits he once controlled, now Skorn's but a vessel
    condemned to serve the castle's new lord for eternity.

events.name: Daughters of Slaughter I
events.description:
The most insidious among the Crowmaidens are under the direct influence of the Voice of the Bog.
    They are protected like the vital organs of a body, and they can't be reached without sacrifice.

events.name: Daughters of Slaughter II
events.description:
The most insidious among the Crowmaidens are under the direct influence of the Voice of the Bog.
    They are protected like the vital organs of a body, and they can't be reached without sacrifice.

events.name: The Corvine Bride
events.description:
A myth to some and a reality to the ones unlucky enough to come across her, the oldest of the 
    Crowmaidens is an unimaginably powerful hag, capable of controlling the bog as if it was one her insidious children.

events.name: Daughters of Slaughter III
events.description:
The most insidious among the Crowmaidens are under the direct influence of the Voice of the Bog.
    They are protected like the vital organs of a body, and they can't be reached without sacrifice.

events.name: Downright Mayhem
events.description:
The creatures roaming the Granite Wilds have become unnaturally enraged! 
    Deal with the crazed beasts before they cause greater harm!

events.name: Lady of the Snow
events.description:
Deep in the heart of Glaceforde, a maiden as old as the White Blight still lives in despair, 
    collecting Igneous Ice shards in an attempt to protect herself from her inevitable death.

events.name: Survival of the Fittest
events.description:
The Frost Steppes allow only the most prepared to thrive, 
    and the yornish folk understand that best..

events.name: Parching Gaze
events.description: The scorching hot sands of the desert are not the only force actively drying the live of the region.

events.name: Keepers of the Lamp
events.description:
When the sacred lamps spread around Castle Thergard are lit again, agonizing souls spawn back 
    into the material world, trying to get rid of the suffering.

events.name: Trench Warfare
events.description:
Casualties are piling up in the Riftsand trenches, and neither side seems to gain an advantage. 
    However, there is a way to make a difference. Join the fray and help turn the tide of the war.

events.name: Clash of the Elements
events.description:
The Djinns have been trying to find new ways to expand their powers and restore their 
    once-vast empire, and they might be able to do so with their new weapon.

events.name: Tainted Breed
events.description: The Slithering Hills, home to a big nest of Venomfang Drakes, was one of the least corrupted landscapes of the Blotch. Something has changed, though...

events.name: Ice Cold Enemies
events.description: Amidst the white veil of a storm, the lumbering shapes of frolls can be seen massing towards the entrance of the Deadbane Halls...

events.name: Warforged Weapon
events.description:
The Djinns have been trying to find new ways to expand their powers and restore their 
    once-vast empire, and they might be able to do so with their new weapon.

events.name: Unweaving Magic
events.description:
Magic emanates from every corner of the Temple of Quorras, and if someone understands how to read its
    blueprints, one may harness this power in the palm of their hands.

events.name: A Dance with Ghosts
events.description:
As time passed, many have lost their lives to the nightmarish events that took place at The Blotch: 
    and many have stayed there. Angry spirits will always be on the prowl to feast on the souls of the good.

events.name: Scales of Corruption
events.description:
Deep down the muddy and forsaken Slithering Hills, a deadly and completely corrupted 
    creature prowls in the darkness while trying to replicate itself.

events.name: Blood Bowl
events.description: A bloody battle arena in Yorn'omaala calls all present to battle for supremacy.

events.name: Undead Harvesting
events.description:
After waiting for enough frostrisen to fall into his trap, Malgrar's willing to pay good coin 
    for any brave adventurers to harvest Igneous Ice from their undead bodies.

events.name: The Whirlwind General
events.description:
Tired of getting its defenses destroyed by raiders, Far'oro leaves his position at the camp to
    punish whomever raises a weapon inside djinn territory.

events.name: The Sandswept Sentinel
events.description:
After a series of attacks to their supplies, Thinfang goes into the battlefield 
    to defend their kind.

events.name: The Wizard Frozen in Time
events.description: At the top of Castle Thergard, a man holding the power of the White Blight rests within his tomb of stone and ice...

events.name: The Caw of Ylzogog
events.description:
Something stirs at the defiled heart of The Blotch... something insidious and unspeakably grotesque. 
    When gazing into nothingness, one must take care not to be changed forever.

events.name: Prison on the Peak
events.description:
Deep down the muddy and forsaken Slithering Hills, a deadly and completely corrupted 
    creature prowls in the darkness while trying to replicate itself.

events.name: In the Eye of the Storm
